toolCall.argumentsJson: {"CommandLine":"powershell -Command \"Get-Content -Path 'C:\\Users\\DELL\\.gemini\\antigravity\\brain\\e2ce67ec-d36e-4d6a-b7d1-a7103081bfc8\\.system_generated\\logs\\transcript.jsonl' | Where-Object { $_ -like '*views/asset.js*' -and $_ -like '*CodeContent*' } | Select-Object -First 2\"","Cwd":"C:\\Users\\DELL\\.gemini\\antigravity\\scratch\\master-construction-portal","WaitMsBeforeAsync":5000,"toolAction":"Searching transcript.jsonl for views/asset.js creation","toolSummary":"Search log for asset.js content"}
